plate.comment:
[CONFORMANCE] shadow_leaf (live-pointer getter): a scalar-typed pointer param (Ghidra int* or short*) is used as a live-STRUCT base -- indexed at a nonzero offset or double-dereferenced -- NOT a scalar in/out value. Not statically emulable; SHADOW-provable against the running game. If a double-deref proves an extra pointer level, correct the prototype.

Retrieves a stat value from a UnitAny structure.

Algorithm:
1. Check if pUnit is NULL
2. If NULL, return 0
3. If valid, return value at pUnit->+0x28

Parameters:
  pUnit: UnitAny* - pointer to the unit structure [IMPLICIT]

Returns:
  int: value at UnitAny+0x28 (0 if pUnit is NULL)

Special Cases:
  - Returns 0 cast to int when pUnit is NULL

Source: ..\Source\D2Common\D2Stat.c

tags.name: CONF_LIVE
tags.comment: CONF axis (equivalence proof), rung 3/4. Proven bit-exact LIVE via the D2Debugger direct-call oracle on chosen inputs against the running game (GRADUATED_CONFORMANCE_PIPELINE_PLAN.md). Mutually exclusive with CONF_DRAFT/CONF_VECTORS/CONF_BATTLETESTED.
